tribal_knowledge.name: N8N Multi-Layer Configuration
tribal_knowledge.description: N8N credentials must be consistent across .mcp.json (for agent context), .env.local (for backend proxy), and CREDENCIALES-GUIA.md (for backup).

tribal_knowledge.name: Kling AI Auth Flow
tribal_knowledge.description: Kling AI uses AK/SK for dynamic JWT generation. Credentials live in .env.local as KLING_ACCESS_KEY and KLING_SECRET_KEY.

tribal_knowledge.name: Flux via OpenRouter
tribal_knowledge.description: Flux image generation uses OpenRouter API (not FAL.ai). Key format is sk-or-v1-xxx. Endpoint is /v1/chat/completions with modalities: ['image', 'text'] and model: black-forest-labs/flux-schnell.

tribal_knowledge.name: PWA Engine & Neon Architecture
tribal_knowledge.description: The 'Mega Modernization'. Synergos V3 is a true PWA Engine backed by Neon (PostgreSQL). Features: 1) Multi-tenant data isolation via RLS. 2) Dynamic Manifest generation (/api/pwa/manifest/[slug]) for custom install experiences. 3) Offline-first capabilities via Service Worker.

tribal_knowledge.name: AgentSyn Orchestration Protocol
tribal_knowledge.description: AgentSyn is not just a chatbot; it's the OS Orchestrator. It analyzes user intent and triggers other modules (e.g., 'handleMarketSynTrigger'). Data flows: User -> AgentSyn (N8N) -> JSON Output -> React State -> MarketSyn/LaunchPlanner. This eliminates manual navigation.

tribal_knowledge.name: SynCards V3 Modernization (Mega-Update)
tribal_knowledge.description: Visual overhaul using Glassmorphism + Dynamic Gradients. Features: 1) AI Background Generator (N8N/Kling/Flux) with user prompts. 2) Platform-specific icon colors (LinkedIn Blue, Instagram Pink) instead of global theme. 3) 'Quick Actions' with gradient overlays.

tribal_knowledge.name: Peramix Migration Plan (April 2026)
tribal_knowledge.description: N8N host migration from AWS (t2.micro) to Peramix VPS X1 (8GB RAM, 4 vCPU). Expected 8x RAM boost and 50% cost reduction. Strategy: Export JSON -> Import to Docker-based Peramix instance.

tribal_knowledge.name: MCP Multi-Server Infrastructure
tribal_knowledge.description: Agent capabilities extended via specialized MCP servers: 'database' (Neon RAG), 'github' (Repo/Issue mgmt), 'vercel' (Deployment mgmt), and 'n8n' (Workflow trigger). useMCP hook handles dynamic registration.

tribal_knowledge.name: MarketSyn Avatar Consistency
tribal_knowledge.description: Logic to generate 3 consistent views (Frontal, Lateral, 3/4) of a character for video generation. Injected into Kling AI task metadata to maintain brand identity across campaigns.

tribal_knowledge.name: Hybrid Social Publishing (N8N + Make)
tribal_knowledge.description: Meta API direct access blocked by Business Verification. Solution: 'Hybrid Bridge'. N8N handles logic/generation (free). Make.com handles ONLY the final API call to Facebook/IG (Free Tier <1000 ops). N8N -> Webhook -> Make -> Socials.

learned_patterns.insight: Hardcoding backend URLs creates friction during setup.
learned_patterns.fix: Always use process.env.N8N_API_URL with a fallback and process.env.N8N_API_KEY for authorization.

learned_patterns.insight: MCP servers in .mcp.json require direct env definitions which might differ from .env.local naming.
learned_patterns.fix: Ensure critical tokens (GitHub, Vercel, Neon) are explicitly mapped in .mcp.json and documented in CREDENCIALES-GUIA.md.

learned_patterns.insight: API keys with prefix 'sk-or-v1-' are OpenRouter keys, not FAL.ai keys.
learned_patterns.fix: Use OPENROUTER_API_KEY env var and OpenRouter chat/completions endpoint for Flux models.

learned_patterns.insight: @neondatabase/serverless is the correct package for Vercel Edge/Serverless functions.
learned_patterns.fix: Use neon() from @neondatabase/serverless with DATABASE_URL. Requires ?sslmode=require in connection string.

learned_patterns.insight: Hardcoding backend URLs creates friction. Updated to use generic webhook endpoint structure.
learned_patterns.fix: Use generic webhook endpoints and map them in configuration.

learned_patterns.insight: V2 script was looking for 'src/projects' while V3 uses 'src/features'. Detected as 'projects missing'.
learned_patterns.fix: Updated Get-ExistingProjects to detect root V3 project via config file presence.

learned_patterns.insight: Cloned repo pointed to community remote (read-only).
learned_patterns.fix: Changed remote origin to user's personal repository.

learned_patterns.insight: Workflow failure due to 'Post Text (Postiz)' node referencing non-existent service.
learned_patterns.fix: Replaced 'Post Text' nodes with standard HTTP Request nodes or direct social integrations in SocialPublisher_Mass.json.

learned_patterns.insight: LLMs strictly follow JSON examples in prompts. If example has 3 items, LLM outputs 3 items.
learned_patterns.fix: Updated 'Generar Campaña' prompt to explicitly require 7 items and removed truncated examples.

learned_patterns.insight: N8N might return markdown-wrapped JSON or invalid tokens in string responses.
learned_patterns.fix: Implemented parsePlan logic to clean response strings, strip ```json markers, and handle direct objects.

learned_patterns.insight: /kling/image-to-video endpoint became obsolete (404).
learned_patterns.fix: Updated seedance.service.ts to use generic /task endpoint with task_type: 'video_generation'.

learned_patterns.insight: Antigravity requires explicit MCP registration in its environment/settings to recognize servers, even if defined in project .mcp.json.
learned_patterns.fix: Provide the supergateway JSON snippet for manual addition to Antigravity configuration.

learned_patterns.insight: N8N API v1 does NOT allow 'active' field in PUT/POST body (400 error). Workflows are created INACTIVE by default. Activation requires a separate POST to /workflows/{id}/activate.
learned_patterns.fix: Use deploy-workflow.mjs to create/update, then manually activate in N8N UI or call activation endpoint separately.

learned_patterns.insight: N8N responses can be: 1) Direct JSON object, 2) Wrapped in {text: '...'} or {output: '...'}, 3) Markdown code blocks (```json), 4) Double-stringified JSON.
learned_patterns.fix: Implemented recursive extraction: Extract rawContent from wrapper fields → Strip markdown → JSON.parse → Retry with double-parse if first fails.

learned_patterns.insight: MarketSyn must mirror AgentSyn structure: Webhook → chainLlm (with lmChatGoogleGemini connected) → respondToWebhook. The chainLlm 'text' param receives the user prompt.
learned_patterns.fix: Created marketsyn-restored.json with correct node types and connections. Deployed as ID: ygn018WImjkhqfWJ.

learned_patterns.insight: AgentSyn webhook expects 'chatInput' field in request body, not 'prompt'. This is because the webhook node is configured for the chat interface.
learned_patterns.fix: Updated LaunchPlanner.tsx to send { chatInput: combinedPrompt } instead of { prompt: combinedPrompt }.

learned_patterns.insight: Native N8N Facebook nodes are fragile with complex permission scopes/app reviews. Direct HTTP Request nodes with a verified Page Access Token are significantly more robust.
learned_patterns.fix: Use 'Pure Meta' workflows: HTTP Request nodes interacting directly with Graph API endpoints, bypassing N8N credential abstraction.

learned_patterns.insight: LLMs may return raw arrays `[...]` instead of wrapped objects `{ days: [...] }`. Validating strict object structure causes parsing failures.
learned_patterns.fix: Updated `LaunchPlanner.tsx` to accept top-level Arrays and wrap them dynamically, and added regex to strip Markdown code blocks.

learned_patterns.insight: Meta requires scheduled posts to have a specific 'published' field or 'scheduled_publish_time'. Bridge Logic: N8N calculates future dates (Now+15m, Now+24h...) and Make sends 'scheduledTime' to Facebook module.
learned_patterns.fix: Optimized social-publisher-fixed.json to calculate ISO dates for 7-day campaigns and throttle requests (2s delay) to avoid Make rate limits.

learned_patterns.pattern_name: N8N Public API vs MCP API
learned_patterns.insight: N8N has TWO different API auth systems: 1) MCP Server API (JWT with aud:'mcp-server-api') for MCP tools 2) Public REST API (JWT with aud:'public-api') for workflow CRUD. Header: X-N8N-API-KEY.
learned_patterns.fix: Generate separate API keys in N8N Settings > API. Use X-N8N-API-KEY header for REST endpoints. Must clean workflow JSON before import (remove id, webhookId, active, meta fields).

learned_patterns.insight: N8N API rejects workflows with extra properties. Only accepts: name, nodes (array without id/webhookId), connections, settings. Tags, meta, active cause 400 errors.
learned_patterns.fix: Created cleanWorkflow() function in import-workflow-to-n8n.mjs to strip incompatible fields before API submission.

learned_patterns.insight: SynCards has push_subscriptions table in Neon. When landing events occur (new lead, chat started), AgentSyn can trigger push notifications to subscribed devices.
learned_patterns.fix: N8N workflow can query push_subscriptions and send web-push via HTTP Request node. Integration: Landing Event -> Neon -> N8N -> Push Notification to SynCards users.

learned_patterns.insight: AgentSyn V2 unifies chat + tracking + leads + calendar in single workflow. Uses Gemini Flash (not OpenAI). Tools: save_lead (PostgreSQL), schedule_meeting (Google Calendar).
learned_patterns.fix: Workflow ID: tANVH2YyAmprNnJH. Events tracked via separate workflow Landing Events Tracker (ID: 13B8i3buSzks9vxa).

learned_patterns.insight: Having two A records (e.g., one for Vercel 76.76.21.21 and one for N8N/Legacy) causes intermittent SSL handshake failures and timeouts. Browsers randomly pick the wrong IP.
learned_patterns.fix: Ensure ONLY the Vercel A Record (76.76.21.21) exists for the root domain. Remove any conflicting A records pointing to other servers (like N8N).

learned_patterns.pattern_name: TypeScript Build Crash due to Backup Folders
learned_patterns.insight: Next.js/TS compiler tries to build everything in the project root, including BACKUP folders with broken relative imports.
learned_patterns.fix: Add 'BACKUP*' to 'exclude' list in tsconfig.json to prevent build failures from legacy code.

learned_patterns.insight: Using Web Standard APIs like `req.json()` or `Response` in a Vercel function defaults to Node.js runtime (which expects IncomingMessage), causing immediate crashes.
learned_patterns.fix: Explicitly set `export const config = { runtime: 'edge' }` in the API route file to enable Web Standard compatibility.

learned_patterns.insight: Vercel Edge Runtime BLOCKS direct IP access (e.g., http://1.2.3.4) for security. Returns 403 Forbidden.
learned_patterns.fix: Use a wildcard DNS service like `nip.io` (e.g., http://1.2.3.4.nip.io) to provide a valid hostname that resolves to the same IP, bypassing the restriction.

learned_patterns.insight: Direct SDKs or specific models can fail due to quota exhaustion or regional restrictions (e.g., Gemini 429/404).
learned_patterns.fix: Implement a tiered model list (Gemini 1.5 -> Gemini Pro -> GPT-3.5) on OpenRouter Paid Tier. If Level 1 fails, the system automatically pivots to Level 2/3, ensuring zero downtime.

learned_patterns.insight: Introducing aggressive new models like Kimi K2.5 as primary can cause response 'freezing' due to rate limits or availability in OpenRouter.
learned_patterns.fix: Always prioritize 'google/gemini-2.1-flash' or 'google/gemini-2.5-flash' as primary. It provides the best balance of speed, reasoning, and reliability for the Coach.

learned_patterns.insight: Standard glassmorphism is too 'flat' for high-performance branding.
learned_patterns.fix: Use glass-premium with backdrop-blur-40px and a linear gradient ::after animation for a liquid metallic shine effect.

learned_patterns.insight: Complex metrics like USRPT require an internal validation step to avoid hallucinations.
learned_patterns.fix: Inject a <thought> loop in the prompt, forcing the model to analyze metrics secretly before outputting the final plan.

cross_project_insights: SaaS Factory V3 requires 'Auto-Blindaje': every credential update must be mirrored in memory_bank.json to prevent setup errors in the future.
AgentSyn is the BRAIN (orquestador), MarketSyn is the MOTOR (ejecutor). SynCards PWA is the interface. Never confuse hierarchy.
Meta API requires Business Verification for pages_manage_posts permission. Without it, Page Tokens work for reading but NOT publishing. Solution: Use Ayrshare as intermediary (50 free posts/month).
N8N API Keys: MCP Server = JWT with 'mcp-server-api' audience, Public API = JWT with 'public-api' audience. Different keys for different purposes.
SynCards Push can receive notifications from ANY module via N8N orchestration. Enables real-time alerts for new leads, completed campaigns, scheduled meetings.
system_logs: 2026-01-17: Updated GitHub, Vercel, Neon, Kling AI, and n8n credentials across .mcp.json and .env.local.
2026-01-18: Replaced Qwen with Flux (OpenRouter) for image generation.
2026-01-18: Built Synergos PWA Engine with multi-tenant schema, dynamic manifest, push notifications, and Service Worker.
2026-01-19: Integrated Jan 13 Backup data. Updated memory_bank with Multi-Server MCP, Peramix migration plan, and MarketSyn consistency fixes.
2026-01-19: Unified N8N Social Publisher V3 workflow created. Fixed maestro.ps1 project listing for V3 Tenants.
2026-01-19: Fixed SynCards AI Image Generation (Kling endpoint harmonization, OpenRouter Flux optimization).

2026-01-19: Debugged MarketSyn empty cards issue. Root cause: N8N workflow destroyed during deployment. Restored as 'MarketSyn-Synergos-Restored' (ID: ygn018WImjkhqfWJ). Updated LaunchPlanner with V3 Recursive Parser.
2026-01-19: WORKAROUND: Redirected marketSyn webhook to AgentSyn (ef270b01...) until dedicated MarketSyn workflow is properly created in N8N UI and verified.
2026-01-19: Deployed to Vercel via CLI (npx vercel --prod). Production URL: https://saas-factory-tau.vercel.app
2026-01-19: Generated Facebook Page Access Token via Graph API Explorer. Saved to CENTRAL_API_VAULT.md. Token expires - needs System User Token for permanence.
2026-01-19: Replaced broken OpenRouter/Flux with Pollinations.ai for reliable free AI image generation in SynCards backgrounds.
2026-01-19: CRITICAL FIX: LaunchPlanner.tsx now checks for both 'plan' and 'days' field names from AI responses. Root cause of 'raw JSON' display issue.

2026-01-19: FIX Social Publisher V3: ItemLists node was receiving data from HTTP node output (losing body.days). Solution: Code node to prepare days+credentials together, persisting through all downstream nodes.

2026-01-19: BLOCKER - Meta API requires Business Verification for pages_manage_posts. Attempted: System User Token (failed - limit 1 admin), Page Tokens (failed - 403 Forbidden), All 22 permissions (failed). Root cause: App Review required for publishing permissions.
2026-01-19: SOLUTION - Implemented 'Hybrid Bridge' (N8N -> Make.com). N8N handles generation/logic, Make.com handles Graph API using its own permissions. Successful test with mapped variables.
2026-01-19: OPTIMIZATION - Implemented Scheduling Logic in N8N: Batch processing (1 post/2s delay) and 'scheduledTime' calculation for 7-day campaigns.
2026-01-21: AgentSyn V2 Landing System created. Unified workflow for chat + tracking + leads + calendar.
2026-01-21: Created landing_events table in Neon (8 columns, 3 indexes) for page tracking analytics.
2026-01-21: Imported N8N workflows via Public API: AgentSyn V2 (ID: tANVH2YyAmprNnJH), Landing Events Tracker (ID: 13B8i3buSzks9vxa).
2026-01-21: Documented N8N API patterns: Public API vs MCP API auth, JSON schema requirements, cleanWorkflow() helper.
2026-01-21: Gemini API Key configured in N8N for AgentSyn V2 Simple workflow (AIzaSyB_...3HyU).
2026-01-24: Resolved DNS A-Record conflict for synergosia.online (Valid SSL verified).
2026-01-24: Fixed Vercel Build Failure by excluding 'BACKUP*' folders in tsconfig.json. Production Deployed.
2026-01-24: Fixed Landing Page Agent (synergosia.online) by enabling Edge Runtime in api/chat.ts to support Web Standard APIs.
2026-01-24: Bypassed Vercel Edge IP restriction using `nip.io` wildcard DNS for N8N connection.
2026-01-24: MIGRATION TO PURE NEON. Removed Supabase MCP. Updated Architecture to Neon (DB) + Supabase (Auth only). Deployed CRM Schema (crm_leads, crm_messages) directly to Neon via node-postgres.
2026-01-24: COMPLETE SUPABASE PURGE. Removed @supabase packages. Removed Supabase Auth. Golden Path Auth is now: Auth.js (NextAuth) + Neon Adapter.
2026-01-26: AI RESILIENCE RECOVERY. Standardized SaaS and Landing Page on 'Chain of Stability' (OpenRouter Paid Tier). Bypassed Google SDK 429/404 quota issues.
2026-01-26: N8N-FREE ARCHITECTURE. Decoupled brain logic from n8n webhooks for high-performance direct AI responses. Enabled Edge Runtime on landing page API for Vercel compatibility.
